description_long: This is a medium-sized copper-colored frying pan with a round, deep bowl and a smooth, reflective metallic finish. The pan features a single, long, black handle that is slightly curved and attached securely to the side, providing ergonomic grip and leverage. The interior of the pan is also metallic, with a seamless transition from the sides to the base, and appears to be well-polished for easy cleaning and even heat distribution. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, without any visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. At the end of the handle, there is a small hole, likely intended for hanging storage. No visible brand logos or markings are present on the pan or handle, and the bottom surface appears smooth without any distinct patterns or ridges.
description: A copper-colored frying pan with a smooth, reflective finish and a long, black curved handle featuring a hanging hole. The pan has a straight, thick rim and a seamless, polished interior.
description_view_0: The pan is shown from a side angle, highlighting the round copper body and the long, black handle extending outward.
description_view_1: This front view centers the handle, showing its attachment point and the circular opening at the end for hanging.
description_view_2: A rear side view displays the pan's depth and the curvature of the handle, with the handle extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: A top-down view reveals the full circular opening of the pan, the smooth interior, and the handle with a visible hanging hole.
attribute_handle_type: Single, long, slightly curved handle made of black plastic or coated metal, ergonomic, with a hanging hole at the end and a smooth surface.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges; smooth and continuous around the circumference.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand markings.
